transcript.text:
(Out of all the broadcasts nationwide...) And I'm the first-ever one to film here
(Been open since 1977...)
(This is the place!!)
(We're eating braised spicy chicken today!)
I heard you are not allowed to film here...
(Sir, SCREAM!) I said I would allow it if Tzuyang came here
(With a grateful heart, she inhales...)
(And the taste...)
It's insane
(A feast of crazily good-looking visuals from the braised spicy chicken...)
This is crazy!
(The taste is crazy as well....!!!!)
(And that's not all...)
(Udon & glass noodles)
(Today's line-up is insane...)
You guys, please don't come here...

(Protect the braised spicy chicken at all costs!!) I will...!
(Protect the braised spicy chicken at all costs!!) I will come here!
(For the sake of this taste, she can even give up on uploading it...) I can just not upload it!
Hello, everyone
Today, I'm here at Umyeon-dong
to eat something very special!
This place has been in business for almost 45 years now,
and they have never been on broadcast before, so
I am here to film it for the first time
It's called Cheongguk-jang* Braised Spicy Chicken *Rich soybean paste stew
(A combo that is slightly unheard of...) It's a dish that combined cheongguk-jang and braised spicy chicken
And it's a reservation-basis,
(She was witty enough to reserve it ahead of time!) so you can't eat here if you don't make reservations
(She was witty enough to reserve it ahead of time!) So I did!
("Umyeon-dong Sonamoo House", Seocho-gu, Seoul)
I'm excited!

(Enters the store) Hello
I heard you are not allowed to film here...
But thank you for allowing me to film
I told you my wife's name is "Jung-won"
Oh, really?!
(Tzuyang's real name = Park "Jung-won") Her name is "Jung-won"...?
(Tzuyang's real name = Park "Jung-won") Choi Jung-won!
(What a coincidence...) Oh! We have the same name
I said I would allow it if Tzuyang came here
(Thank goodness she is Jung-won...) Oh, really?!
(Love fool boss is the best!) I didn't know you'd really come
("Sonamoo House" menu)
The cheongguk-jang braised spicy chicken is really famous here
But I heard regulars eat the original one a lot
So I'll try eating both of them!
There's only two dishes!

One cheongguk-jang braised spicy chicken and one original braised spicy chicken, please
I'd like both of them
- Wow, is this potato jeon (pancake) included? - Yes
(The potato jeon is included in the meal...!)
(Even tofu and kimchi...?!)
Wow, so warm and nice!
(The cheongguk-jang braised spicy chicken is here) It's cheongguk-jang? Thank you
(Concentrated observant mode LOL) Wow, there's cheongguk-jang beans and...
(The way it looks makes me so curious of the taste...!) It's really unique today, but I think it's going to be good!
(Reservations are a must!) This needs to boil for over 1 hour, so reservations are a must
(The original braised spicy chicken is here too!) Thank you, this is the regular!
(Cheongguk braised spicy chicken / Original braised spicy chicken)
First, since they gave me the potato jeon first,
I'll eat this one first
I guess this is included if you order the dish
It's so good...!

It's not like those chewy potato jeon
It's a very crispy potato jeon
(Can you hear how crispy it is...?)
The potato jeon is amazing..!
(Another star among side dishes) And this is tofu & kimchi, so I'll try the side dishes first!
(All of them deserve a pass) All the side dishes are good
I'll try the original first
Look how dark the soup is
(Applause!)
This is why they accept reservations!
It feels like homemade braised spicy chicken
that you eat the next day!
It's so strong!
It's like the deep and strongly flavored one that grandma used to make!
(Another applause!!)
It's insane

Look how big the drumsticks are too
And the potatoes as well!
Get a drumstick!
It doesn't smell at all!
It's light!
(About to cry) It's really good...
I think it'll be game over once I eat it with rice
It's crazy, it's crazy
Wow, it's moderately sweet & salty
and maybe due to the potatoes, the soup is thick
which make this the prime example for spicy braised chicken
(Next is cheongguk braised spicy chicken!) Cheongguk-jang!
Hi...!
You're quite unique
I'm really curious
I'll give it a try

(How is it? How is it?) Wow...How should I explain this?
I can taste the cheongguk-jang for sure
And it's great with rice!
Wow, what is this?
The original and cheongguk-jang one
is half and half!
Those who can't eat cheongguk-jang can definitely enjoy this
So it's not that strong
The signature deep flavor of the cheongguk-jang goes so well with this
It tastes like a mix of cheongguk-jang stew and red pepper paste stew!
Looks good
It's amazing...!
The chicken is so tender...!
Should I try the chicken breast too?
(How will the dry meat taste...?) If the chicken breast is good, it means they know their stuff
It splits so smoothly already!

(Showering with soup on top...!!)
(The dry meat is a pass too!) The chicken breast is good too!
It's delish
(Very serious about braised spicy chicken...)
Oh, since the weather's cold,
eating these things warm up my body and I love it
(Next is potato!) Should I split it? Poke!
It feels different when you poke it!
(The quality of the braised spicy chicken is proven by the potato!) For sure, a braised spicy chicken that has boiled for 1 hour...
The mashing texture!
(Super excited) This is legit! This is the stuff!
(I found it, my potato...) It's so good!
I love both of them
It's not too spicy
(Those who are bad with spicy food, please note...!) If Shin Ramyun is spicy for you, this might be hard for you
And I've just thought of a brilliant idea

(Adding white rice and potato into a bowl!) Add this much rice...
(And skin all the meat from the bones...!)
Do you remember the episode with the child of the person of national merit?
At that time, I really enjoyed the meal
It's around the same quality as that
A ladle-full of soup
Potato too...Wow!
(A fantastic-looking meal)
Seaweed flakes!
This is seriously the cherry on top!
Add them in!
Wow, it looks so good!
This is insane!
(Hehehehe)
I'm happy...
Is this...Heaven...?

What do I do?
Personally, I love the cheongguk-jang braised spicy chicken
But if I come back here,
I think I'll eat the original one!
(The taste that you are familiar with tends to be scarier...!) This really sticks to the basics! You can't get sick of it!
(The mashed potatoes are a stroke of genius...!) Eating it with the mashed potatoes is really insane
When I was young, I said
that I'll marry potatoes...lol
(My dream was to become a potato's wife...) If you like potatoes as much as I do, you'll really enjoy this
(The queen of deboning)
(One more drumstick!)
(She's speechless again because it's so good)
(Boneless chicken meal kit...please...?) I wish they would make a boneless chicken meal kit
(She's bound to empty all their stocks..) I can buy them in bulk and stock up on them
At first, the potato jeon was really good
If you place this on top and eat it...

(The combo of flavors on top of flavors..!)
(This is her fave dish now!) It's my first time eating such a good potato jeon
Let's dip it in the braised spicy chicken soup!
(+Food education LEVEL UP) You gotta eat it like this!
(Now, there's only one piece of chicken left...) I ate it all
Oh, should I mix rice and udon noodles into here?
(Biggest decision in her life...) Wait...I'm torn
(Peekaboo)
(What did they give...?) Oh, really? Wow, thank you!
I was thinking about eating udon noodles!
Thank you!
(Bzzt, Bzzt!) Telepathy?
They gave me udon and glass noodles..!
(Going in right away) I'll add the udon into here...
(The udon noodles have cooked to perfection...!) Wow... the udon noodles...
Adding udon noodles is a must!

A must out of all musts!
Even the udon noodles are good
They're so supple, should I say?
(Next, glass noodles!) I wonder...
First, for the way it looks,
the udon looks better
I wonder!
It's so good!
The glass noodles feel chewier in a way
(Automatic applause...!!)
(The braised spicy chicken became so dark...!) Wow, look how dark it became!
It looks like malatang
It's no joke
Put it on top
I like this meat too
(Tender thigh!) Is this the thigh?

The must-eat restaurant of the year!
Well, we're filming this on Jan. 2nd though... LOL
Should we do an awards ceremony next year?
(Grand Prize for Mukbang) Must-eat restaurant awards ceremony?
Who would take 1st place for last year? Hmm?
I want to try this kind of awards ceremony...!
I think this would be included in the must-eat restaurants of the year!
This is our first filming of the year though lol
(It's that much more delicious...!) But this is a must-eat restaurant of the year
(She's inhaling the chicken...)
Wow, it's so good
(Making the chicken boneless...)
Perfect!
(Adding it back to the pot!)
(Topping it off with white rice)
(Genius food knowledge of the potato wife...)

Wow, what're we gonna do about this?
It looks so good!
(Fried rice is ready in a jiffy!)
(Yes, it's one bowl of rice...) Wow, there's plenty of rice!
(Yes, it's one bowl of rice...) I just added one bowl, and it's this much!
Looks good, right?
Wow, it's more delicious than earlier!!
(A genuine reaction)
(Half of the fried rice is gone...)
If I eat something really delicious...
Ugh!
Ugh!!
I kind of eat it like this
(I think so....) Is it just me?
(Scraping all that is left!)
(Spiciness is coming up...) It's a little spicy

It's spicy and warm, so it numbs my tongue
(She is grateful for potatoes for various reasons) If I didn't mash the potatoes, it would've been very spicy
("Sonamoo House" Braised spicy chicken, ALL CLEARED!)
(Very satisfied)
(A perfect finish with Coke!)
It was so, so delicious
(It was the best, sir...!) It was the tastiest ever!
- Really? - Really, it was the tastiest ever!
Wow, anyway, I had another great meal!
